75UA7700PUA, LG 65UA7700PUB, LG 55UA7700PUB, LG 50UA7700PUB, LG 43UA7700PUB, LG 86UA7500ZUA, LG 75UA7500ZUA, LG 65UA7500ZUA, LG 55UA7500ZUA, LG 50UA7500ZUA, LG 43UA7500ZUA, LG 32LR600BZUC, LG OLED77T4PUA
component.notes:
This is a generic profile for LG Residential Displays released in 2025 and assumes that Always Ready mode is DISABLED (SETTINGS > GENERAL > ALWAYS READY > ENABLE THE FUNCTION == OFF). If desiring to use "Always Ready" features, commands do exist in the custom section of the profile. Please note that the Always Ready feature has a "Screen Off" timeout timer that can be changed within the Always Ready settings. At the time of writing this profile, there was no option to turn off the timer, so the screen will turn off at some point.
*BLUEPRINT SETUP NOTES TO PUT THE TV INTO ALWAYS READY MODE INSTEAD OF POWERING OFF -- FOR IP-CONTROL (IR Control doesn't require Blueprint customization. RS232 doesn't support Always Ready mode)* 1) Inspect the TV>SHOW>COMPONENT CONTROL> Check off "Never Power Off" and generate services. (this will prevent the TV's Power off command from ever sending when the last video service is active in the zone. 2) Open the View Services window, select the zone the TV resides, select the General Programmable Service Requests. a) Create a new workflow by hitting the plus under Service Requests, name it AlwaysReadyModeOn, and double click the workflow to open Automator. b) Search the name of the TV that's already assigned in Blueprint, double click the TV. c) Assign the following values to the workflow item: FUNCTION>HD Monitor RESOURCE>Custom ACTION>"AlwaysReady_Activate[Art, Moments, Movements, Clock]" d) Save the workflow (File>Save). Exit Automator and return to the Blueprint configuration.
3) In Blueprint, navigate to TOOLS>REVIEW>STATE TRIGGERS. Create a trigger as follows: IF(rules)... ZoneHasVideo | Test Condition "is false" THEN... AlwaysReadyModeOn (workflow that was created in step 2).
In order to add button to the Savant Pro App to Power Off the Display (instead of entering Always Ready mode): 1) Add a custom Service Request (by clicking the "+" button) to the General Programmable Service Requests in the Services Window in Blueprint. 2) Check the checkbox labeled "UI" for that item. 3) After naming the new Service Request, add the "PowerOffTV" custom resource action to the automator workflow.
Due to the nature of devices sharing a protocol, but not always behaving identically, this profile can be used until an issue is identified. At that time, the support or profile teams may determine that a new component profile request is needed for this specific model.
OLED T - SPECIFIC COMMANDS WILL BE RELEASED WITH A FUTURE UPDATE. Outside of these specific commands, traditional control of the OLED T models is supported.
The following models are supported under this profile:
OLED97M5PUA, OLED83M5PUA, OLED77M5PUA, OLED65M5PUA
OLED97G5WUA, OLED83G5WUA, OLED77G5WUA, OLED65G5WUA, OLED55G5WUA
OLED83G5SUB, OLED77G5SUB, OLED65G5SUB, OLED55G5SUB
OLED83C5PUA, OLED77C5PUA, OLED65C5PUA, OLED55C5PUA, OLED48C5PUA, OLED42C5PUA
OLED83C5AUA, OLED77C5AUA, OLED65C5AUA, OLED55C5AUA, OLED48C5AUA, OLED42C5AUA
OLED83C5YUA, OLED77C5YUA, OLED65C5YUA, OLED55C5YUA, OLED48C5YUA, OLED42C5YUA
OLED85B5PUA, OLED83B5PUA, OLED77B5PUA, OLED65B5PUA, OLED55B5PUA, OLED48B5PUA
OLED85B5AUA, OLED83B5AUA, OLED77B5AUA, OLED65B5AUA, OLED55B5AUA, OLED48B5AUA
OLED85B5YUA, OLED83B5YUA, OLED77B5YUA, OLED65B5YUA, OLED55B5YUA, OLED48B5YUA
85QNED92AUA, 75QNED92AUA, 65QNED92AUA
85QNED90AUA, 75QNED90AUA, 65QNED90AUA, 55QNED90AUA
85QNED90AAA, 75QNED90AAA, 65QNED90AAA, 55QNED90AAA
86QNED9MAUA, 75QNED9MAUA, 65QNED9MAUA
100QNED85AU
86QNED85AUA, 75QNED85AUA, 65QNED85AUA, 55QNED85AUA, 50QNED85AUA
75QNED85AAA, 65QNED85AAA, 55QNED85AAA
75QNED85AYA, 65QNED85AYA, 55QNED85AYA
86QNED82AUA, 75QNED82AUA, 65QNED82AUA, 55QNED82AUA, 50QNED82AUA, 43QNED82AUA
86QNED80AUA, 75QNED80AUA, 65QNED80AUA, 55QNED80AUA, 50QNED80AUA, 43QNED80AUA
86QNED77AZA, 75QNED77AZA, 65QNED77AZA, 55QNED77AZA, 50QNED77AZA, 43QNED77AZA
75NANO90AUA, 65NANO90AUA, 55NANO90AUA, 50NANO90AUA, 43NANO90AUA
86NANO80AUA, 75NANO80AUA, 65NANO80AUA, 55NANO80AUA, 50NANO80AUA, 43NANO80AUA
86UA9000PUA, 86UA9000AUA
86UA7900YUA, 75UA7900YUA, 65UA7900YUA, 55UA7900YUA, 50UA7900YUA, 43UA7900YUA
86UA7700AUA, 75UA7700AUA, 65UA7700AUA, 55UA7700AUA, 50UA7700AUA, 43UA7700AUA
86UA7700PUA, 75UA7700PUA
65UA7700PUB, 55UA7700PUB, 50UA7700PUB, 43UA7700PUB
86UA7500ZUA, 75UA7500ZUA, 65UA7500ZUA, 55UA7500ZUA, 50UA7500ZUA, 43UA7500ZUA
32LR600BZUC
OLED77T4PUA
IP control isn't supported over WiFi. * 2018 and newer LG TVs require encryption For IP control setup: 1. Press Settings button (Cog) on remote to bring up the settings menu 2. Press down until the cursor is on the "Support" option. Select this. 3. Press down until the cursor is on the "IP Control Settings" option. Select this. 4. Select the "Network IP Control". 5. Set 'Network IP Control' to ON. 6. Press "Generate Keycode" and record the keycode (it's case sensitive). 7. Return to the 'Network IP Control' menu. 8. Press down until the cursor is on the 'Wake On LAN' item. Select this.
Enter the keycode from step 6 as the AccessToken state variable for the component. 1) Inspect the LG HD TV component in Blueprint. 2) In the drop-down 'Show:', select State Variables. 3) Assign 'AccessToken' as the recorded keycode.
If using the App services from this TV, some Apps may need to be downloaded from the TV directly before launching them from Savant.
If using the HBO MAX App, the App ID may need to be changed, depending on the area. This can be changed in Blueprint by performing the following steps: 1) Inspect the LG HD TV component in Blueprint. 2) In the drop-down 'Show:', select State Variables. 3) Assign 'hboMAXappID' one of the following IDs: For the US, MAX app: com.wbd.stream Other countries: com.hbo.hbomax or com.hbo.hbomax-2017
====================== Change Log ================== Version: 1.2 Change: Added ARC support. Risk: Low Importance: Non Critical

state_variable.name: AccessToken
state_variable.note: Enter the keycode from profile setup notes in the initial value field
